name: Epic Systems Corp. v. Lewis
summary: The Supreme Court held that employers may lawfully require employees to resolve disputes through individual arbitration and waive the right to class or collective actions, reinforcing the broad enforceability of arbitration agreements under the FAA.
significance: Reaffirmed that the FAA requires enforcement of arbitration agreements as written, including class action waivers, underscoring the stakes of whether the Section 1 exemption applies to workers like Brock.
